message: My app is getting stuck in a loop when initialising. The url ends up as http://localhost:5173/callback?error=access_denied&error_description=ACTION_MALFORMED%3A%20Invalid%20action%20code&state=M09SandoTkdnd0dyclRLbW1tdHg4UHAxcllQVGoxZ1V5Nkt2SWFQSS02cg%3D%3D im using auth0 to authenticate my react app with their sdk

@src/hooks/shadcn/use-toast.ts update this toast hook to accept a 'persist' flag that will prevent the toast notification from automatically being dismissed. toasts with this flag set to true can only be dismissed manually
make the non-persisted toasts only stay on screen for 5 seconds

@src/mutations/requests.tsx help me update the create request mutation to try create a draft request on error. I need help mapping the create request values to the create draft request values. They should be a smaller version of the create request but with nullable properties.

i get Diagnostics:
1. Type '{ registration: string; makeId: string; modelId: string; year: string; subModel: string; fuelTypeId: string; vehicleTypeId: string; transmission: string; bodyStyle: string; chassisNumber: string; ... 7 more ...; note: string; }' is not assignable to type '{ registration: string | null; makeId: string | null; modelId: string | null; year: string | null; subModel: string | null; fuelTypeId: string | null; vehicleTypeId: string | null; ... 10 more ...; note: string | null; }'.
     Types of property 'parts' are incompatible.
       Type '{ name: string; id: string | null; uploads: ({ id: string; temporaryUrl: string | null; file?: undefined; } | { id: string; file: File; temporaryUrl?: undefined; })[]; categoryIds: string[]; description?: string | undefined; }[]' is not assignable to type '{ name: string; id: string | null; description: string; uploads: ({ id: string; temporaryUrl: string | null; file?: undefined; } | { id: string; file: File; temporaryUrl?: undefined; })[]; categoryIds: string[]; }[]'.
         Type '{ name: string; id: string | null; uploads: ({ id: string; temporaryUrl: string | null; file?: undefined; } | { id: string; file: File; temporaryUrl?: undefined; })[]; categoryIds: string[]; description?: string | undefined; }' is not assignable to type '{ name: string; id: string | null; description: string; uploads: ({ id: string; temporaryUrl: string | null; file?: undefined; } | { id: string; file: File; temporaryUrl?: undefined; })[]; categoryIds: string[]; }'.
           Types of property 'description' are incompatible.
             Type 'string | undefined' is not assignable to type 'string'.
               Type 'undefined' is not assignable to type 'string'. [2322]

review the new request route and the part request creation form. It is implemented with zod and rhf. The performance of the form sometimes feels slows and lags when inputting. Highlihgt any areas that could be effecting the performance negatively, or could be imporved otherwise
help me add a debounce to my shadcn react hook form input @src/components/ui/forms/FormInput.tsx. Plan out how you will tackle this problem and how it will work
